title: HR & Admin Executive [MNC | Central]
description:
[Job ID: 1425346]

Responsibilities

Administration, General Affairs & Legal Support

  • Liaise with internal and external parties to support administrative and corporate matters.
  • Prepare internal communications and coordinate company meetings and events.
  • Manage courier arrangements and liaise with building management on office-related documentation.
  • Assist in preparing corporate documents, including resolutions and filings, and work with the company secretary.
  • Oversee notarisation, legalisation, and maintenance of corporate records and contracts.
  • Coordinate with vendors such as insurance, telecom, property agents, and office services.
  • Manage office maintenance, equipment servicing, pantry supplies, and stationery.
  • Handle keys, access cards, and office assets, including issuance and replacements.
  • Obtain and evaluate vendor quotations and assist with agreement finalisation.

Human Resources

  • Prepare monthly payroll calculations and ensure accurate salary and CPF submissions.
  • Liaise with authorities on employment-related compliance.
  • Support onboarding and offboarding processes, including documentation and system updates.
  • Prepare employment contracts, offer letters, and HR documentation.
  • Post job ads, coordinate with recruitment agencies, and respond to candidate queries.
  • Maintain leave records, verify medical claims, and update HR data.
  • Monitor changes in labour regulations and support HR policy updates.

IT Systems Support

  • Coordinate with external IT vendors for basic IT support requirements.

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma in Business Administration, Human Resources, Accounting, or related disciplines.
  • At least 2 years of experience in administration, HR, or general affairs.
  • Basic understanding of employment regulations and HR processes.
  • High level of discretion with confidential information.
  • Experience liaising with government bodies is an added advantage.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. However, rest assured that all applications will be updated to our resume bank for future opportunities.

Please kindly refer to the Privacy Policy of Good Job Creations for your reference: https://goodjobcreations.com.sg/en/privacy-policy/
